title: Q3 Growth Decision Brief
subtitle: KPI, risks, and next actions for the executive team

compositionDecision.rationale: The brief combines KPI metrics, risks, and recommended actions.

summary: Revenue is ahead of target, conversion is below goal, and churn risk requires immediate onboarding action.

items.text: Revenue is above target while conversion and churn need action.

items.label: High
items.text: Churn rises in new enterprise accounts.

items.label: Medium
items.text: Pipeline quality falls after paid acquisition surge.

items.label: Low
items.text: Support SLA pressure increases during rollout.

items.label: Watch
items.text: Activation lag persists in self-serve segment.
Prioritize onboarding fixes for enterprise accounts.
Shift campaign budget toward high-intent sources.
Review churn cohort weekly until risk returns below 8%.
